settings.hero_heading: Hi everyone, we're The Scrub Hat Shop!
settings.hero_text: Making lightweight, cool and comfortable scrub hats for healthcare heroes all over the world — since 2019.
settings.story_heading: From the operating theatre to your head!
settings.story_text:
My name is Sarah and I am a retired Veterinary Nurse from Surrey, UK. I set up The Scrub Hat Shop in 2019, and since then it has gone from strength to strength — with people buying our hats all over the world.

I was a Vet Nurse for over 15 years and spent most of my time in orthopaedic and spinal surgeries. I know what it feels like to spend long days in theatre, which is why it was so important to me to create hats that were lightweight, cool and comfortable ALL day (and look awesome doing it!).

If you don't see a pattern you like or want to ask a question then feel free to contact us — we're a very friendly bunch!
settings.values_heading: We care for our products, you and the planet
settings.values_sub: — And therefore, all of our products are made with that in mind.
settings.team_sub: — The wonderful people who make every hat possible
settings.cta_heading: Ready to find your perfect scrub hat?
settings.cta_text: Browse our colourful collection of lightweight, comfortable hats — or contact us to design a custom piece just for you.
